video.--link-external-color-hover: oklch(from oklch(from rgb(138, 92, 245) 0.8 0.05 h) calc(l + 0.15) c h)
video.--link-unresolved-decoration-color: oklch(from oklch(from rgb(138, 92, 245) 0.8 0.05 h) l c h / 0.3)
